scripts.deploy:cvt: npm run build:cvt && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.cvt.toml
scripts.deploy:cvt:superhuman: npm run build:cvt:superhuman && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.cvt.toml
scripts.deploy:cvt:tesla: npm run build:cvt:tesla && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.cvt.toml
scripts.preview:cvt: npm run build:cvt && npx wrangler dev --config wrangler.cvt.toml --port 4322
scripts.preview:cvt:superhuman: npm run build:cvt:superhuman && npx wrangler dev --config wrangler.cvt.toml --port 4322
